targets.expression:
fields concat( @log, " [ ", StatusCode, " ]") as Status
| filter ispresent(StatusCode)
| filter StatusCode >= 400 and StatusCode < 500
| filter StatusCode != 404

fields @timestamp, concat( @log, " [ ", Version, " ]") as ServiceVersion
| filter ispresent(Version)
| filter toMillis(@timestamp) >= toMillis(datefloor(@timestamp, 5m))

fields concat( @log, " [ ", StatusCode, " ]") as Status
| filter ispresent(StatusCode)
| filter StatusCode >= 500

panels.description: External vs internal ALB request count (sum)

targets.label: ${PROP('Dim.TargetGroup')}
targets.sqlExpression: SELECT Sum(RequestCount) FROM "AWS/ApplicationELB" WHERE LoadBalancer LIKE "app/cdp-sirsi/%"

panels.title: Request count

panels.description: External vs internal target response time (p95)

targets.label: ${PROP('Dim.TargetGroup')}
targets.sqlExpression: SELECT p95(TargetResponseTime) FROM "AWS/ApplicationELB" WHERE LoadBalancer LIKE "app/cdp-sirsi/%"

panels.title: Target Response Time p95 (External)

targets.expression:
fields @timestamp, @message, StatusCode
| filter ispresent(StatusCode)
| stats count() as Hits by bin(1m), StatusCode

panels.description: The number of active sessions for the database
panels.title: DB Load
Approximate Number Of Messages in DLQ
